title: Context Contracts leverage plan — forensic verification + corrected contracts
question: Are the load-bearing claims of the Context Contracts leverage plan (the context-contracts schema + gather-execution-context behavior, the named relation_types + their directions, the specific item edges, the quantitative + lens/invariant claims) accurate against the real pi-context op source and the live .context substrate — and what is the corrected, source-verified form of each proposed contract.
method: Forensic claim-by-claim verification by a dispatched general-purpose agent against the REAL op implementation (workflowsPiExtension/packages/pi-context/src/execution-context.ts + context.ts) and the live substrate (.context config.json / relations.json / schemas via pi-context read ops + walk-ancestors / context-walk-descendants — the exact primitives the op dispatches to); each direction verified against real stored edges (CTX-8 risk). Orchestrator-relayed. Full corrected analysis: the findings_document.
findings_summary: Architecture is REAL (schema/op/relation-types installed) but the proposal's specifics are substantially wrong. KEY: (1) gather-execution-context does NOT chain relation_types — each entry is an independent single-hop walk from the unit, so feature_contains_story in a task contract is UNREACHABLE (the proposal's reach-feature-via-depth-chaining claim is false); (2) max_depth is INERT (walk primitives unbounded; traversal_depth recorded only). Schema: direction enum is in|out|both (the proposal's 'child'/'parent' all fail) + the example omits required created_by/created_at. Directions reversed (CTX-8): task_depends_on_task=in, story_contains_task=in, verification_verifies_item=in, task_addresses_gap/_feature/_governed_by_decision=out. '300+ edges' false (261); 14 of 30 relation_types in use. Decision contract reaches only DEC-0001..0005 (DEC-44/45/51..54 are not substrate items). 8 named relation_types have 0 edges. context-validate does NOT machine-check contract directions. Adjusted verdict: adopt task/verification/feature/framework-gap with corrected directions; value is single-hop direct-edge bundling, not transitive; defer decision.
findings_document:
VERDICT: the Context Contracts architecture is real (schema, gather-execution-context op, and all named relation_types exist + are installed), but the proposal's specifics are substantially wrong. Adopt the task/verification/feature/framework-gap contracts with the corrected directions; value is SINGLE-HOP direct-edge bundling, not the transitive task->story->feature the proposal advertised; max_depth buys nothing in the current build; defer the decision contract.

== Two architecture-level corrections (not typos) ==
1. gather-execution-context does NOT chain relation_types. Each bundle_relation_types entry is an INDEPENDENT single-hop walk from the unit id (execution-context.ts:183-197). So feature_contains_story in a TASK contract is UNREACHABLE (a task is never an endpoint of FEAT->STORY; live []-both-ways). The proposal's marquee 'reach FEAT-008 from TASK-043 via depth-chaining' (proposal sec 4) is FALSE.
2. max_depth is INERT. walkAncestors/walkDescendants are visited-set bounded but NOT depth-bounded (context.ts:1400-1452; docstring 31-36 'recorded only'); traversal_depth is never enforced. max_depth:1 does not cap to one hop; task_depends_on_task:in returns the FULL transitive prereq chain.

== Schema / validity ==
direction enum is exactly [in,out,both]; the proposal's 'child'/'parent' literals ALL fail validation. The example JSON also omits the required created_by/created_at. Required per contract: id, unit_kind, bundle_relation_types, created_by, created_at. id ^CTX-\d{3,}$; arrayKey 'contracts'.

== op behavior (verified in execution-context.ts) ==
lookup contract by unit_kind (161-174); read unit (150-153); per entry walk closure table by direction: in=walkAncestors (unit is child -> parents), out=walkDescendants (unit is parent -> children), both=deduped union (188-197); maxDepth = Math.min(--maxDepth, spec.max_depth) (184) but inert per above; resolve via cross-block index (208); returns {unit, perRelationType buckets (empty []=[] returned, 199-201), traversal_depth, scoped_at} (217-222); 3 error-RETURN modes (no throw): unit-not-found / contracts-read-fail / no-matching-contract.

== directions corrected (CTX-8 realized; verified vs real edges) ==
story_contains_task=IN (task is child; reach story via ancestors). task_positioned_in_phase=OUT. task_addresses_gap=OUT. task_addresses_feature=OUT. task_governed_by_decision=OUT. verification_verifies_item=IN (VER->TASK; task is child). task_depends_on_task=IN (stored prereq->dependent; the wanted upstream chain = ancestors; out=the single dependent TASK-034).

== corrected CTX-001 (task), schema-valid ==
bundle_relation_types: [
  {story_contains_task, in, 1}, {task_positioned_in_phase, out, 1}, {task_addresses_gap, out, 1},
  {task_addresses_feature, out, 1}, {task_governed_by_decision, out, 1}, {verification_verifies_item, in, 1},
  {task_depends_on_task, in, 2} ]  + created_by/created_at.  DROP feature_contains_story (unreachable from a task).
Real reach for TASK-043: STORY-010 + PHASE-PROMPTWORKSHOP-RUNNER + the 12 prereqs; gap/decision/feature/verification buckets EMPTY (TASK-043 has no such edges) -- a real but thinner bundle than the proposal's prose.

== other four ==
verification: viable, 1 entry verification_verifies_item=OUT (55 edges). feature: viable on the 3 populated relations feature_contains_story=out, feature_depends_on_item=in, feature_gated_by_item=out; rest empty. framework-gap: rebuild on the INBOUND task_addresses_gap=in (38 edges) + decision_addresses_gap=in (2); the proposal's gap_*_by_* family is entirely UNPOPULATED -> defer. decision: file-able with direction fixes but LOW VALUE -- reaches only DEC-0001..0005 (product DECs DEC-44/45/51/52/53/54 are not substrate items), and decision_addresses_issue / decision_supersedes_decision / rationale_supports_decision all have 0 edges.

== quantitative / other corrections ==
'300+ edges' FALSE -> 261 edges. 14 distinct relation_types in use of 30 registered. TASK-043 inbound task_depends_on_task = 12 (TASK-040/041/042/044-052), outbound = 1 (TASK-034) -- corrected an earlier orchestrator undercount of 4. '7+ manual calls' unsubstantiated/rhetorical. context-validate has NO invariant/lens over context-contracts -> a wrong direction is machine-UNDETECTABLE, surfaces only as a wrong/empty bundle, so directions MUST be hand-verified against source (as done here).

8 relation_types named by the proposal are registered but have ZERO edges: decision_addresses_issue, decision_supersedes_decision, rationale_supports_decision, feature_governed_by_decision, feature_resolves_issue, gap_addressed_by_decision, gap_addressed_by_feature, gap_relates_to_issue.

citations.label: gather-execution-context impl (lookup by unit_kind / closure walk / direction / Math.min maxDepth / empty buckets / 3 error-returns)
context-contracts schema (direction enum in|out|both; required created_by/created_at; id ^CTX-\d{3,}$; arrayKey contracts)
real edges (261 total; 14 of 30 registered relation_types in use; per-type counts)
TASK-043 graph (12 inbound task_depends_on_task prereqs; STORY-010; PHASE-PROMPTWORKSHOP-RUNNER; no gap/decision/feature/verification edges)
decision split (substrate DEC-0001..0005 vs product DEC-44.. in seed-round-plan)
